name: CLX - Sentinel Vendor Health Monitor v1

nodes.name: Every 15 min
nodes.notes: Runs every 15 minutes. Computes failure rate per vendor (Postmark email, Twilio SMS, Vapi voice, etc.) over the last 60 minutes. Writes a sentinel_vendor_health snapshot for trending, and fires a sentinel_alerts row when failure rate crosses 30% with a minimum of 10 calls — the threshold at which a vendor issue is real and not just statistical noise.
